titleStmt.title: SII 38.238: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 238. (A.R. No. 238 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the gōpura of the Ādhipurīśvara temple, right of entrance.

p.hi: King: Vijayagaṇḍagōpāla Year: 15, Makara. Śu. di. 1. Monday, Sodi. = 22 September 1264 A.D.

summary.p: Records that Chandrasēkharaṉ Sōmapiḷḷai alias Vaṇiga Sūriyaṉ, a merchant of Tirunāvalūr, made a gift of land after purchase, from the administrators of nāḍu (nāḍāḻvār) of Paḍuvūr-nāḍu in Kāṭṭuppākkam in Eḻumūr-Tuḍarmuḍi-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Puḻar-kōṭṭam. It is also stated that he donated the land, along with its enclosure (kollai) land, and freed it from all taxes (iṟaiyili) and gifted as maḍappuṟakkāṇi, to the Tirujñānasambandan-tirumaḍam, a maṭha (situated) in the south wing of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻar-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḷavaḷanāḍu (sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is stated that he made this grant as per the royal order, to feed the mahēśvaras.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhu[vana]cakkaravattikaḷ vijayakaṇṭako
pālatevaṟku � makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu prathamaiyu
m tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa
maṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkiramacoḻavaḷa nāṭṭut tiruvo
ṟṟiyūril Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉār cakkaṇatta ti
ru vitiyil teṉciṟakil tiruñāṉacampantaṉ tirumaṭam tirunāva
lūr viyāpārikaḷil peṟuṭaiyāṉ cantiracekaraṉ comapiḷḷai
yāṉa vaṇikacūriyaṉ maṭam māheśvarar Amutu ceyya Ivar Ik
koṭṭattu Eḻumūr tuṭarmuṭi nāṭṭu kāṭṭuppākkattu paṭuvūr
nāṭāḻvār pakkal maṭappuṟakkāṇiyākavum Iṟaiyiliyākavu
m Ivar koṭuuṭaiyarāṉa paḻamaṭai turavum Itturavukku A
ṭaitta nilamum kollainilamum Immaṭattukku maṭappuṟa
mākavum Iṉṉila sarvamāniya variniṅkalāka Irācāviṉ
tirumukappaṭi Iṉṉilam cantirātittavarai Imaṭappuṟañce
lvatāka Iṭu taṇ vaṇikacūriyaneṉ Ippaṭikku śrī mā
heśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
